name: Scotch Barley Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried green peas overnight and soak the pearl barley for 2 hours.
2. Wipe the meat clean and trim off any excess fat.
3. Place the meat in a large pot with cold water, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil and skim off any impurities.
4. Add the soaked peas, barley, onions, carrots, turnip, and celery. Simmer gently for 2 hours.
5. Remove from heat, allow to cool, then skim off any fat that has risen to the surface.
6. If desired, remove the bones.
7. Add the remaining vegetables (carrots, turnip, celery) and simmer for an additional 30 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
8. Season with more salt and pepper if needed.
9. Twenty minutes before serving, stir in the chopped parsley and ensure any film of fat on the surface is removed.
